subcodes.first_line: O true companions! Jinab-i-Aqa Hadi—upon him be the Glory of the All-Glorious—is now setting forth in that direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی جناب آقا هادی علیه بهاء الله الابهی الان عازم آن جهت هستند و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
